trans-unit.source: Needed to connect to Meta Wearables
trans-unit.target: Needed to connect to Meta Wearables

trans-unit.source: Camera is used to detect and identify vehicles
trans-unit.target: Camera is used to detect and identify vehicles

trans-unit.source: The app uses your compass to help navigate you to your car
trans-unit.target: The app uses your compass to help navigate you to your car
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Location When In Use Usage Description

trans-unit.source: The app save screenshots for debugging
trans-unit.target: The app save screenshots for debugging

trans-unit.id: %@ has been copied to your clipboard.
trans-unit.source: %@ has been copied to your clipboard.
trans-unit.target: %@ has been copied to your clipboard.

trans-unit.id: 1. **Enter Ride Details**: Provide your vehicle's description and license plate through dictation, typing or copy/paste
trans-unit.source: 1. **Enter Ride Details**: Provide your vehicle's description and license plate through dictation, typing or copy/paste
trans-unit.target: 1. **Enter Ride Details**: Provide your vehicle's description and license plate through dictation, typing or copy/paste

trans-unit.id: 2. **Point Camera**: Aim at the pickup area where vehicles arrive. Magic tap to pause/resume camera.
trans-unit.source: 2. **Point Camera**: Aim at the pickup area where vehicles arrive. Magic tap to pause/resume camera.
trans-unit.target: 2. **Point Camera**: Aim at the pickup area where vehicles arrive. Magic tap to pause/resume camera.

trans-unit.id: 3. **Follow Audio Cues**: Listen for directional guidance and announcements
trans-unit.source: 3. **Follow Audio Cues**: Listen for directional guidance and announcements
trans-unit.target: 3. **Follow Audio Cues**: Listen for directional guidance and announcements

trans-unit.id: 4. **Locate Vehicle**: Audio beeps become faster as you center the car and haptics (if enabled) become faster as you get closer
trans-unit.source: 4. **Locate Vehicle**: Audio beeps become faster as you center the car and haptics (if enabled) become faster as you get closer
trans-unit.target: 4. **Locate Vehicle**: Audio beeps become faster as you center the car and haptics (if enabled) become faster as you get closer

trans-unit.id: Add details about the object (e.g., 'red backpack with white stripes')
trans-unit.source: Add details about the object (e.g., 'red backpack with white stripes')
trans-unit.target: Add details about the object (e.g., 'red backpack with white stripes')

trans-unit.id: Adjust how fast announcements are spoken
trans-unit.source: Adjust how fast announcements are spoken
trans-unit.target: Adjust how fast announcements are spoken

trans-unit.id: Adjusts the speed of spoken directions.
trans-unit.source: Adjusts the speed of spoken directions.
trans-unit.target: Adjusts the speed of spoken directions.

trans-unit.id: Announce every detected car, not just the target.
trans-unit.source: Announce every detected car, not just the target.
trans-unit.target: Announce every detected car, not just the target.

trans-unit.id: Announce status messages like 'Picture too blurry, trying again'.
trans-unit.source: Announce status messages like 'Picture too blurry, trying again'.
trans-unit.target: Announce status messages like 'Picture too blurry, trying again'.

trans-unit.id: Before connecting, you need to enable Developer Mode in the Meta AI app:
trans-unit.source: Before connecting, you need to enable Developer Mode in the Meta AI app:
trans-unit.target: Before connecting, you need to enable Developer Mode in the Meta AI app:

trans-unit.id: By continuing, you acknowledge and accept the above.
trans-unit.source: By continuing, you acknowledge and accept the above.
trans-unit.target: By continuing, you acknowledge and accept the above.

trans-unit.note: Speech: retry due to plate not visible

trans-unit.id: Check that 'Speech Guidance' and 'Audio Beeps' are enabled in settings.
trans-unit.source: Check that 'Speech Guidance' and 'Audio Beeps' are enabled in settings.
trans-unit.target: Check that 'Speech Guidance' and 'Audio Beeps' are enabled in settings.

trans-unit.id: Choose what information you want announced (all cars, retry messages, waiting status)
trans-unit.source: Choose what information you want announced (all cars, retry messages, waiting status)
trans-unit.target: Choose what information you want announced (all cars, retry messages, waiting status)

trans-unit.id: Complete the setup in Meta AI app, then return here.
trans-unit.source: Complete the setup in Meta AI app, then return here.
trans-unit.target: Complete the setup in Meta AI app, then return here.

trans-unit.id: Control how often the same direction is repeated (1-10 seconds)
trans-unit.source: Control how often the same direction is repeated (1-10 seconds)
trans-unit.target: Control how often the same direction is repeated (1-10 seconds)

trans-unit.id: Describe it in detail (e.g., silver laptop with a white and green laptop sticker)
trans-unit.source: Describe it in detail (e.g., silver laptop with a white and green laptop sticker)
trans-unit.target: Describe it in detail (e.g., silver laptop with a white and green laptop sticker)

trans-unit.id: Describe your car (e.g., white Toyota Camry)
trans-unit.source: Describe your car (e.g., white Toyota Camry)
trans-unit.target: Describe your car (e.g., white Toyota Camry)

trans-unit.id: Describe your ride (e.g., white Toyota Camry with license plate ABC123)
trans-unit.source: Describe your ride (e.g., white Toyota Camry with license plate ABC123)
trans-unit.target: Describe your ride (e.g., white Toyota Camry with license plate ABC123)

trans-unit.id: Describe your vehicle (e.g., 'blue Toyota Prius with license plate ABC123')
trans-unit.source: Describe your vehicle (e.g., 'blue Toyota Prius with license plate ABC123')
trans-unit.target: Describe your vehicle (e.g., 'blue Toyota Prius with license plate ABC123')

trans-unit.note: Speech: retry due to API error

trans-unit.id: Directional beeps that increase in frequency as you get closer to your vehicle
trans-unit.source: Directional beeps that increase in frequency as you get closer to your vehicle
trans-unit.target: Directional beeps that increase in frequency as you get closer to your vehicle

trans-unit.id: Double tap to search with this description
trans-unit.source: Double tap to search with this description
trans-unit.target: Double tap to search with this description

trans-unit.id: Double-check the vehicle description and license plate you entered. Use 'Rescan' to restart.
trans-unit.source: Double-check the vehicle description and license plate you entered. Use 'Rescan' to restart.
trans-unit.target: Double-check the vehicle description and license plate you entered. Use 'Rescan' to restart.

trans-unit.id: Enable for public transit buses. Matches by route number and agency logo instead of make and model.
trans-unit.source: Enable for public transit buses. Matches by route number and agency logo instead of make and model.
trans-unit.target: Enable for public transit buses. Matches by route number and agency logo instead of make and model.

trans-unit.id: Enable or disable audio beeps for feedback.
trans-unit.source: Enable or disable audio beeps for feedback.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable audio beeps for feedback.

trans-unit.id: Enable or disable haptic pulses for feedback.
trans-unit.source: Enable or disable haptic pulses for feedback.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable haptic pulses for feedback.

trans-unit.id: Ensure Meta AI app is installed, glasses are powered on, and Bluetooth is enabled.
trans-unit.source: Ensure Meta AI app is installed, glasses are powered on, and Bluetooth is enabled.
trans-unit.target: Ensure Meta AI app is installed, glasses are powered on, and Bluetooth is enabled.

trans-unit.id: Ensure good lighting and point camera at the pickup area. Try the 'Rescan' button.
trans-unit.source: Ensure good lighting and point camera at the pickup area. Try the 'Rescan' button.
trans-unit.target: Ensure good lighting and point camera at the pickup area. Try the 'Rescan' button.

trans-unit.id: Ensure your glasses are open and on your head
trans-unit.source: Ensure your glasses are open and on your head
trans-unit.target: Ensure your glasses are open and on your head

trans-unit.id: Find your vehicle with a simple description
trans-unit.source: Find your vehicle with a simple description
trans-unit.target: Find your vehicle with a simple description

trans-unit.note: Nav title: searching for object class

trans-unit.id: Fine-tune minimum and maximum beep frequency for comfort
trans-unit.source: Fine-tune minimum and maximum beep frequency for comfort
trans-unit.target: Fine-tune minimum and maximum beep frequency for comfort

trans-unit.id: For buses with route numbers and logos
trans-unit.source: For buses with route numbers and logos
trans-unit.target: For buses with route numbers and logos

trans-unit.id: Found %@. Warning: Plate not visible yet
trans-unit.source: Found %@. Warning: Plate not visible yet
trans-unit.target: Found %@. Warning: Plate not visible yet
trans-unit.note: Speech: vehicle found but plate not confirmed

trans-unit.id: Help and Guide. Learn how to use CurbToCar
trans-unit.source: Help and Guide. Learn how to use CurbToCar
trans-unit.target: Help and Guide. Learn how to use CurbToCar

trans-unit.id: How often the same direction is repeated.
trans-unit.source: How often the same direction is repeated.
trans-unit.target: How often the same direction is repeated.

trans-unit.id: Longest time between beeps/pulses when target is at the edge.
trans-unit.source: Longest time between beeps/pulses when target is at the edge.
trans-unit.target: Longest time between beeps/pulses when target is at the edge.

trans-unit.id: Make sure your glasses are open and powered on
trans-unit.source: Make sure your glasses are open and powered on
trans-unit.target: Make sure your glasses are open and powered on

trans-unit.note: Speech: retry due to insufficient info

trans-unit.id: Not sure yet, taking another shot
trans-unit.source: Not sure yet, taking another shot
trans-unit.target: Not sure yet, taking another shot
trans-unit.note: Speech: retry due to low confidence

trans-unit.id: Opens email composer to send feedback to the development team
trans-unit.source: Opens email composer to send feedback to the development team
trans-unit.target: Opens email composer to send feedback to the development team

trans-unit.id: Pastes text from clipboard into the description field
trans-unit.source: Pastes text from clipboard into the description field
trans-unit.target: Pastes text from clipboard into the description field

trans-unit.note: Reject reason: image quality too low
Speech: retry due to blurry image

trans-unit.id: Please share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest features. Your input helps us make the app better for everyone.
trans-unit.source: Please share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest features. Your input helps us make the app better for everyone.
trans-unit.target: Please share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest features. Your input helps us make the app better for everyone.

trans-unit.note: Speech: retry due to ambiguous result

trans-unit.id: Search for specific objects from a list of 80+ classes
trans-unit.source: Search for specific objects from a list of 80+ classes
trans-unit.target: Search for specific objects from a list of 80+ classes

trans-unit.id: Shortest time between beeps/pulses when target is centered.
trans-unit.source: Shortest time between beeps/pulses when target is centered.
trans-unit.target: Shortest time between beeps/pulses when target is centered.

trans-unit.id: Show verification details and debug messages.
trans-unit.source: Show verification details and debug messages.
trans-unit.target: Show verification details and debug messages.

trans-unit.id: Smooths out rapid changes in beep frequency.
trans-unit.source: Smooths out rapid changes in beep frequency.
trans-unit.target: Smooths out rapid changes in beep frequency.

trans-unit.id: Spoken directions like 'left', 'right', 'straight ahead' to guide you
trans-unit.source: Spoken directions like 'left', 'right', 'straight ahead' to guide you
trans-unit.target: Spoken directions like 'left', 'right', 'straight ahead' to guide you

trans-unit.id: Start navigation before a license plate match is confirmed.
trans-unit.source: Start navigation before a license plate match is confirmed.
trans-unit.target: Start navigation before a license plate match is confirmed.

trans-unit.id: Start receiving guidance before license plate is fully verified
trans-unit.source: Start receiving guidance before license plate is fully verified
trans-unit.target: Start receiving guidance before license plate is fully verified

trans-unit.id: Start searching for your car with a description
trans-unit.source: Start searching for your car with a description
trans-unit.target: Start searching for your car with a description

trans-unit.id: Stream video from Meta Ray-Ban glasses instead of phone camera.
trans-unit.source: Stream video from Meta Ray-Ban glasses instead of phone camera.
trans-unit.target: Stream video from Meta Ray-Ban glasses instead of phone camera.

trans-unit.id: Tap the button below to open Meta AI and grant camera streaming permission to this app.
trans-unit.source: Tap the button below to open Meta AI and grant camera streaming permission to this app.
trans-unit.target: Tap the button below to open Meta AI and grant camera streaming permission to this app.

trans-unit.id: The glasses camera will only be used when:
trans-unit.source: The glasses camera will only be used when:
trans-unit.target: The glasses camera will only be used when:

trans-unit.id: Then Siri will ask you to describe your car, and automatically launch the camera
trans-unit.source: Then Siri will ask you to describe your car, and automatically launch the camera
trans-unit.target: Then Siri will ask you to describe your car, and automatically launch the camera

trans-unit.id: This app is an experimental product. While we make every effort to provide accurate results, we cannot guarantee accuracy. You should use discretion and secondary methods to verify information related to your car and services. This app is not intended to replace any mobility aid.
trans-unit.source: This app is an experimental product. While we make every effort to provide accurate results, we cannot guarantee accuracy. You should use discretion and secondary methods to verify information related to your car and services. This app is not intended to replace any mobility aid.
trans-unit.target: This app is an experimental product. While we make every effort to provide accurate results, we cannot guarantee accuracy. You should use discretion and secondary methods to verify information related to your car and services. This app is not intended to replace any mobility aid.

trans-unit.id: Use Siri to quickly start finding your ride hands-free
trans-unit.source: Use Siri to quickly start finding your ride hands-free
trans-unit.target: Use Siri to quickly start finding your ride hands-free

trans-unit.id: Use your Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses for hands-free, first-person detection:
trans-unit.source: Use your Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses for hands-free, first-person detection:
trans-unit.target: Use your Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses for hands-free, first-person detection:

trans-unit.id: Vibration patterns that pulse faster when approaching your target
trans-unit.source: Vibration patterns that pulse faster when approaching your target
trans-unit.target: Vibration patterns that pulse faster when approaching your target

trans-unit.id: What does your car look like?
trans-unit.source: What does your car look like?
trans-unit.target: What does your car look like?

trans-unit.id: Your Meta Ray-Ban glasses are now connected. The app will use the glasses camera when they are open and connected.
trans-unit.source: Your Meta Ray-Ban glasses are now connected. The app will use the glasses camera when they are open and connected.
trans-unit.target: Your Meta Ray-Ban glasses are now connected. The app will use the glasses camera when they are open and connected.

trans-unit.id: car was last seen %lld degrees to the left
trans-unit.source: car was last seen %lld degrees to the left
trans-unit.target: car was last seen %lld degrees to the left

trans-unit.id: car was last seen %lld degrees to the right
trans-unit.source: car was last seen %lld degrees to the right
trans-unit.target: car was last seen %lld degrees to the right

trans-unit.note: Direction guidance: target is to the left
Direction guidance: target is to the right
Direction guidance: target is straight ahead

trans-unit.id: • **'Hey Siri, find my car with CurbToCar'**
trans-unit.source: • **'Hey Siri, find my car with CurbToCar'**
trans-unit.target: • **'Hey Siri, find my car with CurbToCar'**

trans-unit.id: • **'Hey Siri, find my ride with CurbToCar'**
trans-unit.source: • **'Hey Siri, find my ride with CurbToCar'**
trans-unit.target: • **'Hey Siri, find my ride with CurbToCar'**

trans-unit.id: • **Connect**: Tap 'Connect Glasses' to pair with Meta AI app
trans-unit.source: • **Connect**: Tap 'Connect Glasses' to pair with Meta AI app
trans-unit.target: • **Connect**: Tap 'Connect Glasses' to pair with Meta AI app

trans-unit.id: • **Hands-Free**: Keep your phone in your pocket while glasses do the work
trans-unit.source: • **Hands-Free**: Keep your phone in your pocket while glasses do the work
trans-unit.target: • **Hands-Free**: Keep your phone in your pocket while glasses do the work

trans-unit.id: • Meta Glasses mode is enabled in Settings
trans-unit.source: • Meta Glasses mode is enabled in Settings
trans-unit.target: • Meta Glasses mode is enabled in Settings
